author: Abhishek Kumbhar
name: Online Best-Agree Infini-gram Phrase Memory (#1394 base)
blurb: Non-record submission. Online, variable-length, causal phrase memory with purity-weighted blending layered on top of the cached PR #1394 SP8192 base. Real seed-1337 8xH100 run scored 1.08167651 BPB online-best-agree vs 1.08429171 BPB sliding baseline (gain -0.00279899 BPB). Original three-file payload was 76,471 bytes over the 16 MB cap; this package is the lzma2+base85 single-file wrapper that projects to 15,998,983 bytes total. Wrapper itself is not rerun on GPU; reported BPB is from the original 2026-04-26 log included as train_seed1337.log.
